title: Rolife Acrylic Display Box Transparent Showcase Dust Cover Designed for Dollhouse/DIY Miniature House Kit/3D Puzzle/Action Figures (11.3x9.3x9.6inch/28.7x23.7x24.4cm)
features: 【Rolife Acrylic Display Box】Designed for Rolife Dollhouse. This display case is suitable for all Rolife dolls' houses. It also fits most of Rolife's 3D Wooden Puzzles. It can also be used to display action figures.
【3 Min Easy Assembly】Easy to assemble. The edges are smooth and the acrylic case fiting perfectly against the base. The plastic is sturdy and durable, easily cleaned. It's well balanced and solid.
【Quality Materials】The main materials of the product are Polycarbonate and Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene. Rolife uses quality materials to enhance the quality of home life.

【Advantages】It is not only a display case but also a dust cover. It makes your treasured item go from plain on the shelf to being highlighted beautifully. Keep the collection clean, reduce sunlight and ultraviolet radiation, and delay plastic aging.

【Tips】Please make sure the size of what you need to display and the size of this product match. This dust cover measures 11.3x9.3x9.6inch (28.7x23.7x24.4cm). If there is any damage to the product, we offer a replacement service.
